texto: Q. How soon do you expect Argentina to be returned to democratic government?A. We believe we are already within a democratic system. Some factors are still missing, like the expression of the people's will, but nevertheless we still think we are within a democracy.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Roberto Eduardo Viola: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Q. How soon do you expect Argentina to be returned to democratic government?A. We believe we are …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, democracy, fail pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de fail.
